title: Underworld Clan
content:
Underworld Clan
 is a small clan of the 
Outer Realm
.

The members of this clan absorb death aura to cultivate, and the places they gather in are often filled with death aura.

History
[
]

They were gifted a planet in the 
Summoned River Star System
 by the 
Sovereign Council
 after they earned some achievements during the Third Sealed-Outer Realm War.

After Wang Lin appeared to liberate Summoned River, he killed the Underworld Clan's Fifth 
Heaven's Blight
 Patriarch and all the thousands of its members.

Techniques
[
]

Underworld Devour Bliss
